systems.system_notes: NCB proximal tibia plating platform used for tibial plateau fixation within the Zimmer Biomet trauma portfolio.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet technique materials describe dedicated instrumentation and MIS targeting workflow for the NCB proximal tibia system.

components.component_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe the NCB proximal tibia plate family used for tibial plateau fixation.
Official surgical technique materials describe polyaxial locking screw fixation used with the NCB proximal tibia construct.
Official technique materials describe the dedicated targeting guide and instrument workflow for the NCB proximal tibia system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official Zimmer Biomet sources confirm the NCB proximal tibia plate family and instrumentation, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper product-matrix or sterile implant listing pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
